landing.eyebrow: The hub for AI coding agents
landing.tagline: Forge once. Run in every agent.
landing.subhead: Forge Development Hub centralizes, governs, and distributes skills, rules, agents, and hooks for Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, and OpenCode.
landing.agentsHeading: Works with the agents you already use
landing.agentsSub: Install once — your components are materialized into every detected agent.
landing.primitivesSub: Everything Forge distributes is one of four composable kinds.
landing.primSkillBody: On-demand workflow guidance — procedures and references your agent loads when it needs them.
landing.primRuleBody: Always-on guidelines scoped by glob. One rule, one concern, applied automatically.
landing.primAgentBody: Specialized subagents — a system prompt, tools, and template packaged to drop in.
landing.primHookBody: Event-triggered commands (SessionStart, PreToolUse, …) wired into your agent config.
landing.howHeading: From zero to installed in three steps
landing.howSub: One CLI, every agent. No per-tool copy-paste.
landing.howStep1Body: Grab fdh via npm or a signed binary — macOS, Linux, or Windows.
landing.howStep2Body: Pick a harness; fdh resolves the components and detects your agents.
landing.howStep3Body: Your skills, rules, agents, and hooks appear in every detected tool.
landing.catalogSub: Real components, published and scanned. Browse the full catalog anytime.
landing.catalogEmpty: The catalog is warming up — explore it directly.
landing.trustSub: Open to read, controlled to publish.
landing.trustScanBody: Every published version carries a scan status, surfaced in the catalog.
landing.trustSignBody: Releases are tagged and shipped as signed bundles you can verify.
landing.trustSsoBody: Forge identity via Keycloak — roles, audit, and per-team approvals.
landing.harnessBody: A harness is a curated bundle of components. Reference one line in your manifest and your whole team gets the same setup — extend or trim per project.
landing.finalCtaBody: Install the CLI and have your first component running in minutes.
landing.feature1Body: One registry, four agents. Install skills, rules, agents, and hooks once and they appear in every tool you use.
landing.feature2Body: Forge identity via Keycloak. Roles, audit, and per-team approvals.
landing.feature3Body: Skills are 100% portable, following the open agentskills.io standard.

install.title: Install the fdh CLI
install.intro: Download the binary for your platform, verify the checksum, and place it on your PATH.
install.verifyHint: Before extracting, run the verification command to confirm the archive's integrity.

browse.title: Skill catalog
browse.searchPlaceholder: Search skills by name, namespace, or tag

catalog.title: {kind} catalog
catalog.searchPlaceholder: Search {kind} by name, namespace, or tag

componentDetail.installUnavailable: Direct `fdh install` currently supports skills. {kind} are materialized into your project via `fdh init` and hub harnesses.

footer.blurb: One registry for skills, rules, agents, and hooks — forged once, materialized into Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, and OpenCode.
